Join Our Team

We are proud of the care team that makes a difference, every day, in the lives of hundreds of residents. We are dedicated to being leaders in long-term care and seniors housing, and we are looking for energetic people who are passionate about enriching the lives of seniors.

Our employees are focused on building trust, supportive working relationships, and creating a healthy workplace environment for residents, families, and fellow team members.

Fillable Job Application

Build a Rewarding Career at the IOOF Seniors Homes!

Join our compassionate and dedicated team at the IOOF, where you’ll make a meaningful difference in the lives of our residents every day. We offer a supportive work environment and the opportunity to grow your career in long-term care.

Ready to make an impact? Visit our Indeed page to explore current job openings and apply today!

Visit Indeed

Departments﻿

The IOOF is an independent organization with all services performed on-site.
﻿Departments include:

Resident Care

Food Services
